mapper.select: SELECT id, group_id AS groupId, user_id AS userId, apply_msg AS applyMsg, status, handled_by AS handledBy, handled_at AS handledAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM im_group_join_request WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT gjr.id AS requestId, gjr.user_id AS userId, u.user_no AS userNo, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), u.username) AS nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, gjr.apply_msg AS applyMsg, gjr.created_at AS createdAt FROM im_group_join_request gjr JOIN im_user u ON u.id = gjr.user_id WHERE gjr.group_id = #{groupId} AND gjr.status = 0 ORDER BY gjr.created_at ASC
